notes: Sepolia L1 is SuperJam's identity/naming chain (ERC-8004 agent identity + ENSv2-native names) AND the CCTP #2 cross-chain source (Ethereum Sepolia = CCTP domain 0 → Arc domain 26). Identity is signed by the dedicated ENS-admin key (ENS_V2_SIGNER_KEY), distinct from the Dynamic Arc payment wallet. All money flows are on Arc testnet (see arc-testnet.json). Base Sepolia was removed 2026-06-13 (Durin L2 superseded by ENSv2; CCTP re-pointed Base Sepolia → Ethereum Sepolia; historical #2 burn/mint evidence retained in docs/bounties).

ensV2.registry: set via ENS_V2_REGISTRY (SuperjamRegistry, self-contained IRegistry+resolver, agent-owned)
ensV2.notes: Mints <slug>.superjam.eth resolvable in standard ENS tooling. See packages/onchain/src/ens-v2.ts. Verified live: guestbook.superjam.eth resolves.

erc8004.notes: CANONICAL ERC-8004 reference registries (erc-8004/erc-8004-contracts), NOT deployed by us — bound to via packages/onchain/src/erc8004.ts. Deterministic CREATE2 addresses, same on every chain (we ride Sepolia L1). Identity = ERC-721 agent NFTs (register(agentURI)→agentId); Reputation = giveFeedback(agentId,int128 rating,…). Set ERC8004_REGISTRY=identityRegistry to enable; reputation defaults to the paired address in the binding.
